script.name: CreateHistoryObjectObserverTableType
CreateHistoryObjectTableType
CreateHistoryUpdateQueueItemTableType

procedure.name: UpdateCachedHistoryObjects

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: DELETE FROM [HistoryObjectObserver] OUTPUT deleted.[Parent] WHERE [Parent] LIKE :likeCondition OR [Child] LIKE :likeCondition;

WITH cte AS ( SELECT TOP(:count) huqi.* FROM [HistoryUpdateQueueItem] huqi WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST) WHERE [ServerConnectionUid] IS NULL AND [Attempt] < :attemptLength AND [NextUpdateDate] <= :currentTimestamp ) UPDATE cte SET [ServerConnectionUid] = :serverConnectionUid, [LastUpdateDate] = :currentTimestamp OUTPUT inserted.[Id], inserted.[ObjectId], inserted.[ObjectTypeUid], inserted.[LastActionDate], inserted.[DeleteRelated], inserted.[Attempt]
WITH cte AS ( SELECT [ServerConnectionUid] FROM [HistoryUpdateQueueItem] WITH (ROWLOCK, READPAST) WHERE [ServerConnectionUid] = :serverConnectionUid ) UPDATE cte SET [ServerConnectionUid] = NULL

procedure.name: HistoryObjectObserversUpsert
HistoryObjectsUpsert
HistoryUpdateQueueItemsUpsert
